sql_array: CREATE TABLE spatial_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, location GEOMETRY, data_value VARCHAR(255), exec_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, location, data_value) VALUES (1, ST_MakePoint(1, 1), 'Point A'), (2, ST_MakePoint(2, 2), 'Point B'), (3, ST_MakePoint(3, 3), 'Point C');
SELECT DB.DBA.SPARQL_REXEC_WITH_META('SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s bif:st_overlaps ?o }', @metadata) FROM spatial_data WHERE bif:st_overlaps(location, ST_MakePoint(NULL, NULL)) IS TRUE;

SELECT id, location FROM spatial_data WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spatial_data AS inner_sd WHERE inner_sd.data_value = 'Point A' AND bif:st_overlaps(inner_sd.location, spatial_data.location) IS TRUE);
SELECT id, data_value, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY data_value) as value_count FROM spatial_data GROUP BY id, data_value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT DB.DBA.SPARQL_REXEC_WITH_META('SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s bif:st_overlaps (ST_MakePoint("foo", 5e-324)) }', @exec_metadata) FROM spatial_data WHERE location IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, location FROM spatial_data WHERE bif:st_overlaps(location, ST_MakePoint(1, 1));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table WHERE location IS NOT NULL AND bif:st_overlaps(location, ST_MakePoint(2, 2));
